name: Nicotinamide riboside MCI/Alzheimer bioenergetics registry
summary: Active-not-recruiting early phase 1 registry testing NR effects on brain energy metabolism, oxidative stress, and cognitive function in MCI or mild Alzheimer disease, with no posted results.
population: Adults and older adults with mild cognitive impairment or mild Alzheimer disease

trial_details.expected_results_window: Estimated completion was May 15, 2026, but no posted results were present in the Jun. 8, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: This parent interventional trial is the relevant NR Alzheimer/MCI registry behind the passive-sensor ancillary lead.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results could clarify whether NAD or redox-restoration programs translate biomarker target engagement into prespecified function, physiology, safety, or disease-boundary outcomes.
